title: Lilith: A Romance
summaries: "Lilith: A Romance" by George MacDonald is a fantasy novel published in 1895. Mr. Vane discovers a mysterious parallel universe through his library mirror, guided by the enigmatic Mr. Raven. There he encounters sleeping dreamers, children who never grow up, and the seductive Lilith—Adam's first wife and a dark princess. This profound tale explores life, death, and salvation through a haunting journey where true life may only be found in death, and redemption comes at a terrible price. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
